9:00AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN PRO PER, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, SIRKKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2048 POLK ST. #217 S.F, CA. 94109 $814.33 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $814.33, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
